descriptionHtml:
Custom Mega RIB S47 For Sale 2023 | Guest Cabins:1 | Tax Paid

Only 15 hours engine hours only!!!

If you are looking for a modern, versatile and well‑equipped RIB, this Custom Mega RIB S47 For Sale 2023 offers a strong opportunity, especially for buyers seeking a vessel in genuinely good condition. Built in 2023 and located in Athens, Greece, she has been lightly used, showing only 15 engine hours as of July 2024. Designed with practicality and comfort in mind, this S47 blends performance with thoughtful onboard features, making her suitable for day cruising, island‑hopping, guest transport or private leisure use.

Specifications:

• Location: Athens, Greece
• Year built: 2023
• Length overall: 14.14 m
• Beam: 3.97 m
• Draft: 0.89 m
• Fuel capacity: 1360 litres
• Water capacity: 300 litres
• Engines: Volvo Penta 2 x 440 hp (in & out), 15 hours (July 2024)
• Generator: Coelmo DM600 6KWA, 5 hours (July 2024)
• Cabins: 1
• Heads: 1
• Air‑conditioning: Yes
• Autopilot: Garmin
• GPS: Yes
• Plotter: Yes
• Bimini: Yes
• Electric tables
• Electric fridge
• Deck shower
• Fusion sound system, interior and exterior speakers
• Bow thruster
• Full night LEDs
• Bathing ladder
• Gangway
• Main anchor with chain
• Life raft

Overall, this Custom Mega RIB S47 For Sale 2023 presents a solid and well‑maintained RIB, suitable for various types of outings and offering a comfortable environment for guests. Located in Athens and available for viewing, she offers a straightforward, practical package for anyone searching for a modern RIB with low hours and dependable equipment.Contact Us Now!
